title: Redact Captain command-output previews
goal: Redact token-like or credential-like content from bounded Captain execution stdout/stderr previews while keeping deterministic hashes for full original outputs.

acceptance.assertion: Captain command previews use a deterministic redaction helper for token-like strings, URL credentials, bearer tokens and common GitHub token patterns.
Docs state whether hashes cover original or redacted output; preferred contract is original-output hash with redacted previews.
Receipts do not expose raw token-like preview content.
Tests cover long stdout/stderr with token-like content, redacted previews and deterministic hashes.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #106 bounds command previews but does not redact token-like content.
